Name: Glasser Coffee Co.
Menu: Glasser Coffee Co. - Home Home About Place An Order The Coffee Our Store ​the word 'glasser' can be interpreted in many ways. in korean it is the phonetic translation to the word "so" (그래서) , and is the way in which we find our relationship with coffee. in william glasser's choice theory, he outlines five essential needs that dictate human behavior (love, freedom, fun, power, survival), but we'd like to think coffee would have been the likely runner up. it could also reflect the ways we want to be transparent like glass, through dialogue and openness. ultimately, we invite you to come in and create your own meaning. © GLASSER COFFEE COMPANY Home About Place An Order The Coffee Our Store

Menu: Clear Flour Bread | Brookline, MA top of page Skip to Main Content SIGN UP FOR OUR NEWSLETTER coffee bar drinks, grab & go breads daily & weekly breads pastries daily & weekly pastries specials weekly specials Passover Easter More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Video by @FoodLens.   Check them out here! about us Established in 1982, Clear Flour Bread specializes in making authentic breads & pastries of France, Italy & Germany.  Using simple ingredients - flour, water, salt and yeast - we scratch mix and hand shape long fermented doughs for stone hearth baking. All of our flour is unbleached and unbromated.  Our freshly milled rye, whole wheat, and spelt flour is stone ground & locally sourced.  No dough conditioners, preservatives or improvers of any kind are added. Our entire menu is made fresh daily by a highly skilled staff committed to preserving the art and craft of traditional bread & pastry making while taking a modern approach. * denotes items containing tree nuts OUR PRODUCTS breads pastries specials pizza dough instructions MORE farmers' markets world peace cookie donation clear flour merch gift cards QUESTIONS? allergens storing our bread & pastries employment opportunities pizza night LOCATION 178 Thorndike Street Brookline, MA 02446 (617) 739-0060 HOURS, bakery Monday, 4/6: 8am–5pm Monday– Friday: 8am–6pm Saturday–Sunday: 9am–6pm HOURS, coffee bar Monday–Sunday: 8am–3pm © 2025 by Clear Flour Bread bottom of page
